scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist && cp src/index.html dist/ && cp -r static dist/ && concurrently "bun x tailwindcss -i src/styles.css -o dist/styles.css --watch" "bun build src/dice.js --outfile dist/dice.js --watch" "bun --hot serve.ts"
scripts.build: bun x tailwindcss -i src/styles.css -o dist/styles.css --minify && bun build src/dice.js --outfile dist/dice.js --minify && cp src/index.html dist/ && cp -r static dist/
